author: rakeshk
name: Static-Unified Flash-Nitro (SUFN)
blurb: Optimized modded-nanogpt with a perfectly static 1024-sequence graph. Uses native is_causal=True Flash Attention (SDPA) for O(n) efficiency and a robust distributed token loader to handle phase transitions without recompilation. Validated with high-stride TTT for sub-10 minute wallclock compliance.
